name: Hubble Tension Analysis
description: Pantheon+ SNe Ia (1701 supernovae) distance modulus analysis: test ΛCDM predictions and measure H₀ tension

name: Galaxy Color Bimodality
description: SDSS DR18 galaxy photometry: quantify red sequence + blue cloud bimodality in g-r color

name: Exoplanet Mass-Period Relation
description: NASA Exoplanet Archive: test Kepler's third law scaling and mass-period correlation in confirmed planets

name: Gaia HR Diagram Structure
description: Gaia DR3 astrometry+photometry: characterize main sequence, giant branch, and white dwarf sequence

name: Galaxy Redshift Distribution
description: SDSS spectroscopic redshifts: test for clustering and void structure in local universe (z < 0.5)

name: Exoplanet Period Distribution
description: Transit/RV discoveries: test for period valley near 10 days and hot Jupiter desert

name: Stellar Parallax Accuracy
description: Gaia DR3 parallax error analysis: quantify systematic offsets and distance uncertainties

name: Star Formation Fraction
description: SDSS u-r color as star formation proxy: measure blue fraction evolution with redshift

name: Transit Depth Statistics
description: NASA Exoplanet Archive: distribution of transit depths across discovery methods

name: Dark Energy Equation of State
description: Pantheon+ distance modulus: constrain w(z) with binned SNe Ia analysis

name: GW Mass Distribution
description: LIGO/Virgo chirp mass and mass ratio distribution: test population synthesis models

name: CMB Acoustic Peak Structure
description: Planck TT power spectrum: measure acoustic peak positions and cosmological parameters

name: ZTF Transient Classification
description: ZTF transient light curves: test SNe classification and host galaxy association

name: TESS Stellar Host Parameters
description: TESS Input Catalog: mass-radius relation for exoplanet host stars

name: Cluster Richness-Mass Scaling
description: SDSS redMaPPer richness as mass proxy: test self-similar scaling relation

name: GW Electromagnetic Counterpart
description: Cross-match GW events with ZTF transients for multi-messenger association

name: Stellar TESS-Gaia Cross-Match
description: Link TESS host stars with Gaia astrometry for precise distance-luminosity calibration

name: Econ-Astro Funding Correlation
description: Correlation between national R&D funding and astronomical discovery rates

name: Survey Design Optimization
description: Apply epidemiological adaptive sampling to astronomical survey strategy

name: GDP-Inequality Nexus
description: Test Kuznets curve and Gini-GDP relationship across countries. Bayesian model comparison for linear vs inverted-U vs no relationship.

name: Trade Network Structure
description: Analyze global trade network topology. Test scale-free properties, hub-and-spoke structure, and trade flow power laws.

name: Inflation-Growth Dynamics
description: Investigate nonlinear inflation–growth relationship across economies. Threshold regression to find optimal inflation ranges.

name: CO2-Temperature Attribution
description: Quantify CO2 forcing contribution to observed warming using Granger causality and attribution analysis on instrumental records.

name: Extreme Weather Trends
description: Statistical analysis of extreme weather event frequency trends. Fit GEV distributions, test for changing return periods.

name: Sea Level Acceleration
description: Test for acceleration in sea level rise using tide gauge + satellite altimetry data. Quadratic vs linear trend comparison.

name: Vaccination-Mortality Reduction
description: Quantify causal effect of DPT/measles vaccination coverage on under-5 mortality rates. Instrumental variable + panel data approach.

name: Preston Curve Evolution
description: Test whether the Preston curve (income vs life expectancy) has shifted upward over decades. Time-varying coefficient analysis.

name: Disease Burden Inequality
description: Analyze concentration of disease burden by income quintile. Gini-like health inequality metrics across countries and time.

name: Wealth-Health-Climate Triad
description: Three-way interaction: GDP per capita, life expectancy, and CO2 emissions. Test Environmental Kuznets Curve with health co-benefits.

name: Urbanization Cascade
description: Urbanization → economic growth → emissions → health impacts causal chain. Structural equation modeling across 150+ countries.

name: EXOPLANETS Period-Mass Probe
description: Novel exploration of period–mass relation in exoplanets data. Untested variable pair — first measurement.

name: EXOPLANETS Period-Radius Probe
description: Novel exploration of period–radius relation in exoplanets data. Untested variable pair — first measurement.

name: SDSS Redshift-U_G Probe
description: Novel exploration of redshift–u_g relation in sdss data. Untested variable pair — first measurement.

name: SDSS Redshift-G_R Probe
description: Novel exploration of redshift–g_r relation in sdss data. Untested variable pair — first measurement.

name: GAIA Parallax-Gmag Probe
description: Novel exploration of parallax–gmag relation in gaia data. Untested variable pair — first measurement.

name: GAIA Parallax-Bp_Rp Probe
description: Novel exploration of parallax–bp_rp relation in gaia data. Untested variable pair — first measurement.

name: PANTHEON Zhd-M_B Probe
description: Novel exploration of zHD–m_b relation in pantheon data. Untested variable pair — first measurement.

name: PANTHEON Zhd-M_B_Err Probe
description: Novel exploration of zHD–m_b_err relation in pantheon data. Untested variable pair — first measurement.

name: Theoretical: Black Hole Information Paradox
description: Paradox analysis: Black holes appear to destroy information, violating quantum unitarity. Implications: ['Quantum gravity must preserve unitarity', 'Spacetime may be emergent from entanglement']

name: Theoretical: Entropic Gravity Deep-MOND (Entropic)
description: Information-theoretic prediction: At a = 7.008e-41 m/s²: Entropic suppression. Newtonian a=7.008e-41 m/s², Entropic a=9.171e-26 m/s².
